title: GEAS Mission State
description: Mission-scoped runtime index. Captures which phase, task, and batch this mission is in so execution can resume without rebuilding contracts or evidence.

status.description: Overall progress of this mission's current session.

mission_id.description: Mission ID matching the enclosing mission directory.

mission.description: Human-readable mission statement copied from the current mission spec.

current_task_id.description: ID of the task currently being executed.

completed_tasks.description: IDs of tasks that have been closed within this mission.

session_latest_path.description: Path to the human-readable session summary used for post-compact recovery.

recovery_class.description: Recovery class from the last session recovery. Null if the session started clean.

scheduler_state.description: Implementation-reported execution state for this mission's runtime loop.

parallel_batch.description: Task IDs being executed in the current parallel batch within this mission. Null when running sequentially.

completed_in_batch.description: Task IDs resolved within the current parallel batch.
